source_jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT LAYER

Over the last decade, a vibrant ecosystem of SMB software tools has emerged to help SMBs manage and run their businesses. These tools help SMBs with everything from payments to payroll, but accounting has lagged behind. Small business owners are still struggling with disconnected, generic, accounting software and expensive bookkeepers.



At Layer, we’re building a new kind of accounting software and bookkeeping that lives within the existing software tools SMBs use every day. Our platform allows software companies to quickly launch modern accounting software and bookkeeping services to their SMB customers, eliminating the need for them to use legacy accounting tools or bookkeepers.




THE ROLE

We want engineers who can build a team and a company, not just a best-in-class product. We believe that certainly takes broad technical competence across our tech stack, but it also takes harder to find abilities, such as…

 - Thinking forward from first principles and backwards from customer needs at the same time.

 - Curiosity about both technical and business problems.

 - Navigating competing priorities and tradeoffs using your own mental map of company goals.

 - A desire for ownership in product & team decisions.

 - Loving people and wanting to make your teammates around you better at their own strengths.

We think world class early-stage engineers often share some common background experience, such as:

 - 2+ years of experience on strong software teams

 - Experience with the highs and lows of building new products from scratch

 - A track record of growth in team leadership

That said, we deeply appreciate and admire people who take initiative to pursue problems & opportunities they care about, so we are always excited to meet folks who reach out even if they don’t fit that exact profile.




OUR STACK

We don’t index on how familiar candidates are with our tech stack. That’s one of the benefits of hiring excellent engineers: we’re confident you’ll get up to speed and we’re confident the rest of the team can help you do it. That said, we want everyone to be excited about the environment and tool kit they’ll have on day one.

 - API language: Kotlin

 - Embedded components: React

 - API framework: Ktor

 - Database: Postgres (RDS)

 - ORM: Exposed

 - Testing: Kotest/JUnit

 - CI/CD: Github Actions

 - Deployment: Containerized ECS service behind API Gateway

 - Monitoring/visibility/logging: Betterstack & Sentry







OUR TEAM & CULTURE

What we value in people

 - Curiosity. Everyone, even startup vets, will have to learn on the job 90% of what it'll take to be successful. On top of that, everyone at Layer needs to learn accounting too. Thriving in this environment usually means having a natural curiosity for both people and systems.

 - Enjoying the startup journey. Startups are hard no matter what, but they’re only as enjoyable as you make it. We are having fun and we don’t believe we can succeed as a team without that sense of fun, so it’s important that the whole team loves what they do each day both when success feels easy and when it doesn’t.

 - Caring about the product and the user. We love small businesses. We love small business owners. We believe they’re important as people, their business outcomes are important, and that our product is a big part of creating those outcomes.




BENEFITS

 - Competitive seed-stage salary

 - Top of market equity

 - An employee friendly equity plan

 - Health/dental/vision

 - Lunch in-office

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT LAYER

Over the last decade, a vibrant ecosystem of SMB software tools has emerged to help SMBs manage and run their businesses. These tools help SMBs with everything from payments to payroll, but accounting has lagged behind. Small business owners are still struggling with disconnected, generic, accounting software and expensive bookkeepers.



At Layer, we’re building a new kind of accounting software and bookkeeping that lives within the existing software tools SMBs use every day. Our platform allows software companies to quickly launch modern accounting software and bookkeeping services to their SMB customers, eliminating the need for them to use legacy accounting tools or bookkeepers.




THE ROLE

As a Customer Success Manager at Layer, you’ll help small businesses get set up on our bookkeeping service smoothly and serve as their ongoing point of contact. You’ll leverage your bookkeeping knowledge to answer users’ questions, troubleshoot issues, and provide an exceptional customer experience.



In this role, you will:

 - Run live video onboarding calls with new customers to gather key business context and complete bookkeeping setup (bank/credit card connections, historical bookkeeping needs, etc.).

 - Support customers across chat and email by answering bookkeeping questions, diagnosing issues, and driving them to resolution quickly and empathetically.

 - Maintain accurate customer notes and status updates in internal systems to ensure strong follow-through and smooth handoffs.

 - Collaborate with other Layer teams to improve workflows and surface product feedback based on recurring customer needs.

 - Exceed partner and customer expectations by providing thoughtful, proactive, and detail-oriented support.




SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

Many backgrounds could fit this role, but ideal candidates will have some or all of the following:

 - 2+ years of experience in a customer-facing (support, onboarding, etc.) or bookkeeping role

 - Familiarity with small business bookkeeping fundamentals and basic financial concepts

 - Strong live communication and active listening skills

 - Excellent written communication skills

 - Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

 - An ownership and growth mindset
